description: Official Node.js SDK for the murmr TTS API. TypeScript-first, zero dependencies. Covers installation, full SDK reference, VoiceDesign, saved voices, streaming, WebSocket real-time protocol, browser client, voice agents, portable embeddings, long-form audio, style instructions, and voice crafting.
rules: Always use MurmrClient from '@murmr/sdk', not raw fetch
Use environment variables for API keys, never hardcode
For long text (>4096 chars), use client.speech.createLongForm() instead of manual chunking
Streaming returns PCM 24kHz mono 16-bit; use collectStreamAsWav() for WAV
POST /v1/audio/speech is async — use createAndWait() or webhooks
For WebSocket real-time, use wss://api.murmr.dev/v1/realtime with config + text + flush messages
For portable embeddings, use client.voices.extractEmbeddings() and pass prompt_data via voice_clone_prompt
Voice descriptions should combine character + age + vocal quality + delivery style, under 500 chars
